title: 250 Piece Universal Eye Glasses And Watch Repair Screw Kit Revolving Organizer
description:
While there may be no universal screw for your watch or eyeglasses, there is the Universal 250 Piece Universal Eye Glasses And Watch Repair Screw Kit! The eyeglass and watch repair kit contains various tiny screws that will hopefully contain the screw you need to repair your glasses, sunglasses or timepiece. The set includes the following components: - 3.5mm Pipe F/T - 4.5mm Pipe F/T - 4.2 BHO Super H/T - 2.5mm Carbon F/T - 8.0 BHO Super H/T with Hexa Imp Nut - Nose Pads - 3.0mm R/B F/T - 3.5mm Rd. Thin Head - Asst. Winding Watch Screw - Asst. Auto Winding Watch Screw - Asst. Quartz Watch Screw - Convenient Revolving Storage Case
